reasonCodes.safeMessage: Current head SHA evidence is missing.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Record the current PR head SHA in structured evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Evidence head SHA does not match current head.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate evidence for the current head.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Evidence is stale or lacks freshness proof.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Rerun checks and update evidence.
Run the quality gate on the PR head.
Record command, result, exit code or pass/fail, date, source, and head SHA.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Weak evidence wording was used as proof.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Replace weak wording with structured command evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Production or release claim lacks required evidence.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Remove the claim or provide complete evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Human confirmation is required but incomplete.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add current-head structured human confirmation.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Human confirmation is missing required fields.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Complete the required structured confirmation fields.
Fix the underlying failure.
Remove the value and keep only safe labels.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Changed files do not match allowed scope.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Remove forbidden or unrelated changes.
Revert forbidden path changes.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Local replay and CI context do not agree.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Replay with the current PR body and head SHA.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: GitHub API evidence could not be fetched.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Provide GitHub token read access or rerun in GitHub Actions.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: CI replay was not requested in this context.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Run ci replay with repository, PR number, and head SHA when PR parity is required.
Add .codex/evidence-pack.json or rely on legacy PR body fallback when allowed.
Fix the evidence pack schema fields.
Fix current-head confirmation fields.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Core harness depends on project-specific assumptions.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Move profile behavior behind optional compatibility mode.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Profile checks are required in core mode.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Set profile compatibility to optional or explicitly enable profile mode.
Rewrite AGENTS.md as clean UTF-8 text.
Replace values with safe labels.
Document Node/runtime and setup guidance.
Add deterministic safe golden fixtures.
Fix gate behavior or fixture expectations.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Best of N evidence is required for this risk.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add candidate count, selected candidate, and safe reasons.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Best of N evidence is incomplete.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Complete the Best of N evidence fields.
Keep queue entries safe-summary-only.
Use the current safe trace schema.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Safe trace contains unsafe value-shaped content.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Remove raw values and set rawValuesStored false.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Curator report attempts an automatic action.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Make curator report suggestion-only.
Use allowed safe action labels only.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Offline evolution proposal attempts automatic action.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Keep proposals human-approved and suggestion-only.
Complete proposal-only fields.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Required test coverage evidence is missing.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Map changed area to test command and edge/failure paths.
Add baseline and new measurement summaries or remove the claim.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: AGENTS.md contains unreadable text outside or inside the harness block.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Repair AGENTS.md as readable UTF-8 safe context.
Keep exactly one current harness block.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: AGENTS.md is missing the current harness block.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add one current harness block.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Target harness manifest is missing or invalid.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add docs/process/CODEX_HARNESS_MANIFEST.json for target mode.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Changed files could not be classified safely.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Classify the change or narrow the scope.
Run project-defined checks or provide explicit review status.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: CODEX_SKIP_NPM cannot be used for product-relevant changes.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Run appropriate project checks or mark emergency manual review.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Runtime readiness claims require product checks.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Run smoke, build, test, or project-defined runtime checks.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Package or lockfile changes require package verification.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Use repository package verification conventions.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Target quality score could not be computed.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Run target-mode local quality gate with JSON output.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Target quality score has a blocking gate.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Fix the blocking target gate before merge.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Workflow quality runner found a blocking failure.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Fix the reported required status or gate failure.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Workflow quality runner received invalid or unsafe report data.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate the local quality gate JSON report.
Add docs/process/CODEX_CHANGE_CLASSIFICATION_RULES.json.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Change classification rules are invalid or unsafe.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Fix the classification rules JSON.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Unknown files were changed in PR context.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Classify the files or narrow the PR scope.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Required product verification evidence is missing.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add safe command evidence for product-relevant changes.
Fix the normalized evidence schema.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Product verification evidence contains unsafe content.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Remove unsafe values and keep safe summaries only.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Test metrics are missing when claimed.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Provide safe test metrics or remove the runtime metric claim.
Use the current safe test metrics schema.
Remove raw logs and unsafe values from metrics.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Performance or runtime metric claim requires safe metrics.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add safe baseline and new measurement summaries.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: PR metadata is stale for the current harness context.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Refresh the PR or rerun evidence on the current base and head.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Structured confirmation does not match the current head.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add current-head structured confirmation.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: PR text presents an old harness version as current.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Update PR evidence to the current source harness version.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Compact reason summary is invalid or unsafe.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate safe reason summary from the report.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Required remote product baseline evidence is missing.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Attach a safe current-base baseline evidence object.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote product baseline evidence is stale.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Refresh baseline evidence for the current base.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote product baseline is already failing.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Treat candidate failures as baseline-blocked until baseline is repaired or accepted.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote product baseline evidence is invalid or unsafe.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate safe baseline evidence using the schema.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote npm diagnostic evidence is not present.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add safe diagnostic metadata if an npm failure needs classification.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote npm diagnostic evidence is invalid.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate diagnostic evidence from safe metadata only.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote npm failure category is unknown.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Classify the failure with safe markers or request owner review.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote npm diagnostic evidence contains unsafe content.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Remove raw logs and unsafe values from diagnostic evidence.
Fix the safe preflight setup issue before running the quality gate.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Workflow preflight found a missing required harness file.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Restore the required harness file or update target manifest correctly.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Safe artifact index is invalid or unsafe.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate the safe artifact index from safe artifact names only.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: An expected safe artifact is missing.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Generate the missing safe artifact or record a safe not-applicable reason.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Open PR hygiene report found stale PR evidence.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Refresh or close stale PRs after owner decision.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Open PR hygiene report needs owner decision.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Ask the owner whether to refresh, keep, or close candidate PRs.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Candidate failure matches a known failing baseline.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Repair or accept the failing baseline before treating candidate as ready.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Candidate failed while baseline was passing.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Fix the candidate regression or update evidence if classification is wrong.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Target final summary is invalid or unsafe.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate the final summary from safe report fields.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A workflow-required status did not pass.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Fix the reported status and rerun the workflow on the current head.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: The PR body is missing required method sections.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add the required compact PR sections for the declared profile.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A quality gate failure was reported.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Review safe failure reasons and rerun the failed gate.
Use one of the supported safe PR profile labels.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Fast path preconditions were not met.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Use full verification or fix the precondition failure.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Fast path is not allowed for product-relevant changes.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Run the full product verification path.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Diagnostic consolidation is invalid or unsafe.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate the consolidated diagnostic summary from safe fields.
Run the workflow quality runner to produce the consolidated summary.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: An unsafe value class could not be classified safely.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Redact or reclassify the value in a constrained safe field.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Unsafe value action matrix requires redaction or failure.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Remove concrete unsafe values and keep only safe labels or booleans.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Invalid report recovery did not complete safely.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate fallback artifacts without storing the raw report.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Safe artifact count exceeded the configured budget.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Keep primary human artifacts compact and rely on indexed machine artifacts.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A required safe artifact is missing.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate required workflow artifacts.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: PR profile is missing and was inferred.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add a concise PR profile label that matches the change.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Declared PR profile conflicts with inferred risk profile.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Update the PR profile or explain the mismatch.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Open PR hygiene found overlapping harness-managed files.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Ask the owner whether to refresh or sequence the overlapping PRs.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: GitHub Actions runtime advisory needs follow-up.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Track action runtime migration without changing versions automatically.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Actions runtime deprecation has become blocking.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Update action runtime configuration or affected actions.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Task mode is missing for a change that needs explicit discipline.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add a Task mode field using an allowed safe label.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Bugfix evidence is missing reproduction status.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Record reproduced, baseline fail, or a safe reason reproduction was not possible.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Bugfix evidence is missing a root-cause status.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Record the root cause or hypothesis before changing code.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Bugfix evidence is missing verification status.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Record pass, fail, partial, or a safe not-run reason.
Remove unrelated changes or split them into a separate task.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: PR profile assist has a safe repair hint.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add the missing profile sections named by the safe summary.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Product verification failure was explained with safe labels.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Fix the underlying product verification gate result.
Fix the safe import smoke config schema or remove it.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Configured safe import smoke check failed.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Fix the import target or expected export list.
Fix the safe runtime risk register schema.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Runtime or release readiness is blocked by an open release-blocking risk.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Remove the readiness claim or close the risk with required evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A critical runtime risk was closed without required evidence.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add the required safe evidence or keep the risk open.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Checkout and remote evidence disagree for the same head.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Use current checkout evidence first and refresh remote evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Fast path is denied and full verification is required.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Run the product or runtime evidence required by the existing gates.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Bugfix reproduction was not possible but a reason was provided.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Keep the reason and verify by the smallest available check.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Bugfix root cause is a hypothesis.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Verify the hypothesis or record remaining risk.
Run the missing focused check or record why it is not available.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Bugfix regression test is absent with a reason.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add a regression test when feasible or keep the safe reason.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A critical runtime risk area changed without an impact summary.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add a concise safe runtime risk impact summary.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Code review monitor found a blocking review concern.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Resolve the blocking review monitor finding.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Review surface rules are missing or invalid.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Fix CODEX_REVIEW_SURFACE_RULES.json or the safe local override.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Product change lacks enough safe review surface evidence.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add safe review surface and verification evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Product change has no test change or safe reason.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add test evidence or a safe reason no test file changed.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Bugfix review evidence is missing reproduction, root cause, or verification.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add bugfix evidence before merge.
Add acceptance criteria or Done when evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Refactor lacks a behavior invariant summary.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Auth surface changed without negative test evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Storage surface changed without integrity evidence.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add data integrity, migration, or concurrency risk evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: API surface changed without compatibility summary.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Runtime surface changed without smoke evidence or safe reason.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add smoke/import/runtime verification or a safe reason.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Large product diff needs review scope evidence.

Split product files out of the harness change.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Code review monitor summary contains unsafe or invalid output.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Redact unsafe values and keep safe summary only.
Fix prompt governance blockers.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Skill change lacks matching eval evidence.

Fix review eval suite schema or cases.
Fix review monitor behavior or fixture expectation.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Prompt variant auto-apply behavior is forbidden.

Restore product verification failure protection.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Prompt governance summary is unsafe or invalid.

Fix knowledge map schema.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Knowledge map references a missing source.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Knowledge map marker or version is stale.

Add required skill to knowledge map.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Required eval suite is not indexed.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Required contract policy is not indexed.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Policy may be orphaned from the knowledge map.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Knowledge map contains deprecated version reference.

Fix task contract schema and fields.
Add verification surface.
Add done criteria.

Fix handoff schema.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Handoff head SHA mismatches current head.

Remove raw logs or raw diffs from handoff.
Add positive and negative fixture evidence.
Fix load-bearing evidence schema.
Justify high runtime cost or lower default mode.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Stub or fixture pass was used with readiness claim.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Remove readiness claim or provide real evidence.
Separate display evidence from completion claim.
Review complexity governance output and fix the failing safe reason.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Task complexity could not be classified.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Provide task mode, PR body, changed files, or classification evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: High-complexity work is missing a task contract.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add a task contract with done criteria, verification surface, risk surface, scope, and stop condition.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: High-complexity work is missing required oracle evidence.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add test, smoke, fixture, schema, validator, static check, or justified manual check evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: High-complexity work requires a split plan or split reason.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add a split plan or explain why the bounded change should stay together.
Add constraints, allowed scope, forbidden scope, or stop condition.
Resolve the contradictory goal and forbidden scope before implementation or merge.
Add acceptance criteria, done criteria, or an explicit done-when statement.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Evidence effort is weak for task complexity.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add plan, task contract, verification evidence, risk surface, or rollback/stop condition.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A reproducible verification artifact is required.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add a test, fixture, schema, validator, smoke command, reproduction command, migration check, or static check.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A required verification tool is unavailable while verification is claimed.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Provide the tool, use a safe alternative, or remove the readiness/verification claim.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A missing tool weakens verification evidence.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Record the missing tool impact and provide a safe alternative or owner-accepted residual risk.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Large output or many-step work increases review risk.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Use compact safe artifacts and reproducible validators instead of long explanations.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Task appears impossible under current constraints.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Revise the goal or constraints before implementation.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Fixture-only evidence is insufficient for runtime readiness.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add runtime smoke, test, schema, validator, or remove the readiness claim.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Auth or security surface change lacks required oracle evidence.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add negative-case auth/security evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Storage or concurrency surface change lacks integrity evidence.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add failure-path, data integrity, migration, concurrency, or rollback evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Release gate lacks required oracle evidence.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add current-head evidence plus rollback or stop condition.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Runtime readiness lacks required oracle evidence.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add smoke, test, schema, validator, or current-head runtime evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Large diff requires split plan or split reason.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Split the work or document why the bounded change is reviewable.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Multi-surface high-complexity change requires split plan or split reason.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Split by risk surface or add an explicit split reason.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Verification references a command that appears unavailable or invented.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Use an existing repo command or mark the check unavailable with reason.
Fix the complexity eval suite schema and fixture shape.
Fix complexity gate behavior or the deterministic fixture expectation.
Review baseline health inputs and product relevance.
Provide current baseline evidence or confirm harness-only scope.
Refresh the baseline evidence for the current head.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Product-relevant work used skip-npm without verification.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Run product verification or remove product-relevant scope.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Baseline and candidate regression are not separated.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Separate baseline failure from candidate failure evidence.
Restore the missing safe evidence path.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote product baseline evidence path was lost.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Propagate baseline evidence into workflow summaries.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Product verification evidence path was lost.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Propagate product verification status safely.
Include humanConfirmation in the current-head evidence pack.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Complexity or oracle status path was lost.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Propagate complexity governance status into summaries.
Emit safe failed case IDs without raw logs.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A failed self-test did not export a failed case ID.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add safe failed case export metadata.
Review PR body surface labels.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A PR body surface false positive was detected.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Use changed files and negation-aware surface labels.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A safe heading hint is available.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add the suggested exact heading if required.
Add the exact required heading.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A heading near miss was detected.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Use the exact heading text.
Review score cap and top reason metadata.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: The requested self-test profile is not allowed.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Use a full or standard profile for product-relevant work.
Update active harness-managed markers.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Old source harness marker was detected.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Update active source-managed markers to the current version.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: The minimal safe failure artifact is missing.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Create the lifeboat artifact before running the quality gate.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: The lifeboat artifact contains unsafe output.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate the artifact with safe reason codes only.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A no-artifact failure was not classified safely.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Classify the failure phase and preserve a safe next action.
Repair the registry schema and required entries.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A changed file is not covered by the classification registry.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add a safe registry entry or narrow the changed file set.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: The classification registry conflicts with source manifest scope.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Align registry entries with source-managed manifest scope.
Add an explicit registry entry for the entrypoint.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote and local quality contexts differ.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Compare safe parity summaries and rerun with matching context.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote changed files differ from local changed files.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Refresh changed-file evidence for the current PR head.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote classification rules differ from local rules.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Ensure remote and local runners use the same harness version.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote registry hash differs from local registry hash.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Rerun after the current registry is present on the PR head.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote saw an unknown file that local classification did not see.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Refresh local changed-file context and registry coverage.
Repair the safe template profile inputs.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A safe PR body template hint is available.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Use the suggested profile skeleton when updating PR body text.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Gate decision trace is missing for a failed report.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Generate a safe one-screen decision trace.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Gate decision trace contains unsafe output.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Regenerate the trace with safe reason summaries only.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: The lifeboat artifact was generated but upload evidence is missing.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Check the artifact upload step and preserve safe failure evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Version lineage evidence is incomplete or inconsistent.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Align active harness markers, manifests, and self-test references.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: An active harness-managed marker uses the wrong version.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Update the active marker to the current harness version.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Rendered evidence lacks required human confirmation.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add current-head human confirmation fields.
Classify the failure with a safe next action.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A failing artifact does not include a safe next action.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Add a safe next action that does not weaken the gate.
Fix the deterministic security finding or add required oracle evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A dangerous API pattern was detected.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Remove the pattern or confine it to a deterministic fixture.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Workflow permissions were escalated without task contract support.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Review evidence appears to be writer-only.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Required task brief evidence is missing.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Best-of-N record contains forbidden raw candidate content.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Environment profile does not support the claimed verification.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Use available tools or adjust verification claims safely.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: GitHub auth is required but unavailable.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: AGENTS.md exceeds the harness context budget or embeds policy bodies.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: A target-only policy would be deleted.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Remote product PR context evidence is missing.
reasonCodes.nextBestFix: Run current-head PR checks with product baseline evidence.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: workflow_dispatch evidence was used as a PR substitute.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Artifact evidence does not match the current head.

reasonCodes.safeMessage: Goal scope expanded beyond the requested task.
